rationale: PR title 'chore(review): automated dependency review for spegel 0.6.0 → 0.7.1 (PR #205)' and body describe adding the .copilot-review/result.md artifact for the Spegel Helm chart bump. The diff adds exactly that single new file with the structured envelope (`pr: 205`), Verdict (Yellow), v0.7.0 risk analysis (new hostPath persistence /var/lib/spegel, QUIC transport, peer metadata protocol change, Containerd ≥2.1 requirement, scope/protocol breaking changes), v0.7.1 data-race fix, two-deployment-path analysis (bootstrap vs Flux), and pre-merge checks with concrete kubectl/talosctl commands. The review correctly identifies that ocirepository.yaml already tracks 0.7.1, the local containerdRegistryConfigPath override neutralizes the upstream default change, and includes specific upstream PR links (spegel-org/spegel#1196, #1174, #1228, etc.) as evidence. Pure documentation artifact, no source manifests changed.
